creator: max@mober.at
text:
The patch from bug 204827 needs to be updated to support the current 1.15.1 release of krb5.

Additionally the port installs samba42 even if samba44 is installed - for me it built successfully with samba 4.4.8. I'm quite new to FreeBSD and do not fully understand the DEPENDS syntax, but isn't there a way to make it compatible with samba42, samba43 and samba44?

One last question: Is there a reason why to keep 1.11.7 - upstream released 1.15.0 lately?
